series_metadata.series_description: This form is submitted by commercial permit holders at the end of each racing meet. It is a summary of the amount wagered on each racing day and is submitted together with a final remittance based upon the total amount wagered during the meet.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 5 years after the end of the calendar year. ; Paper: 5 years after the end of the calendar year. If scanned, retain for 6 months., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
